question_text:
A nutritionist is comparing two breakfast options:
Option 1: Cereal with milk (350 kcal)
Option 2: Toast with butter and jam (420 kcal)

Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Option 1 stores more chemical energy because milk is a liquid

options.label: B
options.text: Option 2 stores 70 kcal more chemical energy than Option 1

options.label: C
options.text: Option 1 has more energy because cereal is a grain

options.label: D
options.text: Neither option stores chemical energy—energy is only in hot drinks

correct_answer: Option 2 stores 70 kcal more chemical energy than Option 1
explanation: The difference in energy content is 420 − 350 = 70 kcal. Both foods store chemical energy regardless of their physical state or type. A balanced breakfast would consider both energy content and nutritional value.
